# NOJAI

NOJAI is an automated trading platform focused on broker connectivity, controlled execution, and dashboard-based plan access.

Primary URLs:
- https://nojai.io/
- https://nojai.io/about
- https://nojai.io/contact
- https://nojai.io/courses
- https://nojai.io/blog
- https://nojai.io/pricing (pricing section on homepage)

Trust URLs:
- https://nojai.io/privacy
- https://nojai.io/terms
- https://nojai.io/risk-disclosure

AI reference URL:
- https://nojai.io/ai

Sitemap:
- https://nojai.io/sitemap.xml
